item.title: AU Small Finance Joins Mojo Stocks List Following Robust Q4 Financials
item.description: AU Small Finance has been added to the prestigious Mojo Stocks list as of 18 May 2026, reflecting its impressive financial turnaround and strong fundamentals. The mid-cap bank’s latest quarterly results demonstrate significant growth across key metrics, positioning it favourably within the competitive small finance banking sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Manba Finance Q4 FY26: Profit Growth Masks Rising Concerns as Stock Plunges 24% YTD
item.description: Manba Finance Ltd., a Mumbai-based non-banking financial company specialising in vehicle financing, reported a net profit of ₹11.13 crores for Q4 FY26, representing a decline of 14.92% quarter-on-quarter but a robust 38.78% year-on-year increase. Despite the strong annual growth, the stock has suffered a severe correction, trading at ₹106.75 as of May 18, 2026, down 24.05% year-to-date and 21.59% over the past year, significantly underperforming the broader NBFC sector which posted a positive 6.99% return during the same period. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Rishabh Instruments Q4 FY26: Stellar Profit Growth Masks Margin Concerns
item.description: Rishabh Instruments Limited, a micro-cap player in the electrical equipment sector with a market capitalisation of ₹1,824 crores, reported consolidated net profit of ₹19.70 crores for Q4 FY26, marking a remarkable 212.20% year-on-year surge from ₹6.31 crores in Q4 FY25. However, the quarter-on-quarter performance showed a marginal decline of 1.40% from ₹19.98 crores in Q3 FY26, raising questions about momentum sustainability despite the impressive annual comparison. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Apollo Micro Systems Q4 FY26: Defence Powerhouse Delivers Stellar 169% Profit Surge
item.description: Apollo Micro Systems Limited, a leading player in India's aerospace and defence sector, has reported exceptional financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, with consolidated net profit surging 168.71% year-on-year to ₹37.62 crores. The Hyderabad-based defence electronics manufacturer posted a sequential profit growth of 46.50% from the previous quarter, demonstrating strong operational momentum as India's defence modernisation drive accelerates. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Geekay Wires Q4 FY26: Profit Margins Shrink Amid Revenue Decline and Elevated Other Income Dependence
item.description: Geekay Wires Ltd., a micro-cap player in the iron and steel products sector with a market capitalisation of ₹282.00 crores, reported mixed results for Q4 FY26 (Mar'26 quarter), with net profit declining 8.40% year-on-year to ₹6.75 crores despite a sequential drop of 13.68% from the previous quarter's ₹7.82 crores. The company's shares witnessed sharp volatility, plunging 9.10% following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns about deteriorating operational performance and weakening core profitability. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Cantabil Retail Q4 FY25: Margin Pressures Dampen Strong Revenue Growth
item.description: Cantabil Retail India Ltd., a prominent player in India's garments and apparels sector, reported a mixed performance for the quarter ended March 2026, with robust revenue growth overshadowed by significant margin compression. The company posted a net profit of ₹29.23 crores for Q4 FY25, representing a 29.90% increase year-on-year but a sharp 35.18% decline quarter-on-quarter. With a market capitalisation of ₹1,819 crores, the stock has struggled to maintain momentum, currently trading at ₹227.20—down 29.33% from its 52-week high of ₹321.50. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Super Sales India Q4 FY26: Margin Collapse Triggers Fourth Consecutive Quarterly Loss
item.description: Super Sales India Limited, the Coimbatore-based garments and apparels manufacturer, reported a net loss of ₹1.39 crores in Q4 FY26, marking the fourth consecutive quarter of losses and deepening concerns about the company's operational viability. The ₹246.00 crore market capitalisation company witnessed its operating margin excluding other income plunge to 6.58% from 10.49% in the previous quarter, whilst revenue declined 0.91% sequentially to ₹102.92 crores. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Unjha Formulations Q4 FY26: Losses Deepen Despite Revenue Growth as Operational Challenges Mount
item.description: Unjha Formulations Ltd., a Gujarat-based pharmaceutical company specialising in Isabgol (Psyllium) formulations, reported a troubling quarterly performance for Q4 FY26, posting a net loss of ₹0.74 crores despite revenue growth. The micro-cap company, with a market capitalisation of ₹9.00 crores, saw its stock decline 0.55% to ₹20.00 following the results announcement, reflecting investor concerns about deteriorating profitability and operational challenges that have plagued the company throughout the fiscal year. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: H P Cotton Textile Mills Q4 FY26: Margin Pressures Mount as Revenue Declines Sharply
item.description: H P Cotton Textile Mills Ltd., a Haryana-based manufacturer of cotton specialty yarns and sewing threads, reported a challenging fourth quarter for FY26, with net profit declining to ₹0.68 crores from ₹0.98 crores in the year-ago period, marking a year-on-year contraction of 30.61%. The ₹43-crore market capitalisation company faced headwinds from declining revenues and compressed margins, raising concerns about near-term operational momentum. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Lakshmi Mills Q4 FY26: Modest Recovery Masks Deeper Profitability Concerns
item.description: Lakshmi Mills Company Ltd., the century-old Coimbatore-based textile manufacturer, reported a net profit of ₹1.92 crores for Q4 FY26 (January-March 2026), marking a decline of 5.88% quarter-on-quarter but a significant turnaround from the ₹0.66 crore loss recorded in the same quarter last year. The company's stock, currently trading at ₹7,606.40, has gained 1.36% following the results announcement, though it remains 24.38% below its 52-week high of ₹10,059.00. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Tera Software Q4 FY26: Strong Revenue Surge Masks Margin Compression Concerns
item.description: Tera Software Limited (NSE: TERASOFT), a Hyderabad-based e-governance solutions provider, delivered a robust revenue performance in Q4 FY26 with net sales surging 122.71% year-on-year to ₹74.74 crores, marking the company's highest-ever quarterly revenue. Net profit climbed 144.75% YoY to ₹7.22 crores, though sequential growth moderated to 13.34% from the previous quarter. The micro-cap stock, currently trading at ₹302.30 with a market capitalisation of ₹359.00 crores, has witnessed significant volatility, declining 23.92% year-to-date despite posting strong operational numbers. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd Q4 FY26: Profit Surge Masked by Margin Compression
item.description: Amir Chand Jagdish Kumar (Exports) Ltd., a basmati rice processor and exporter, reported consolidated net profit of ₹19.96 crores for Q4 FY26, marking an 11.63% year-on-year increase but a concerning 42.46% sequential decline from Q3 FY26's ₹34.69 crores. The sharp quarter-on-quarter contraction comes despite robust revenue growth, raising questions about operational efficiency and margin sustainability at the ₹1,293 crore market capitalisation company. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Are Capital Trade Links Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Capital Trade Links Ltd's latest results are mixed; while revenue grew by 5.99% to ₹5.66 crores and operating margins improved, net profit fell sharply by 55.46% to ₹1.02 crores due to rising interest costs and a significant drop in other income, indicating underlying challenges. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Are Karnika Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Karnika Industries Ltd's latest results show a net profit increase to ₹8.97 crores, primarily driven by non-operating income, while revenue declined to ₹71.74 crores and operating margins fell to 10.71%, indicating operational challenges. Investors should be cautious due to the reliance on non-operating income and monitor the company's performance closely. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Are CLIO Infotech Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: CLIO Infotech Ltd's latest results show a remarkable turnaround with a 9,600% increase in revenue and a net profit of ₹0.28 crores, indicating strong operational improvements. However, concerns about the sustainability of this performance remain due to a fragile balance sheet and lack of investor confidence. Time: 3 hours ago
